nasb.text: And Jehu slept with his fathers, and they buried him in Samaria. And Jehoahaz his son became king in his place.

esv.text: So Jehu slept with his fathers, and they buried him in Samaria. And Jehoahaz his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 耶戶和他的祖先同享安息，葬在撒瑪利亞，他兒子約哈斯接續他作王。

ccb.text: 他与祖先同眠后葬在撒玛利亚，他儿子约哈斯继位。
